articles.title: Prosecutors Scoff At Tiffany Haddish's Claim Delayed DUI Case Hurt Her Career - TMZ
articles.description: Tiffany Haddish says her DUI case has dragged on so long it should be thrown out ... but prosecutors are firing back, arguing the actress hasn't shown the delay actually hurt her.

articles.description: Nobody seemed to want to leave Madison Square Garden after the Knicks' wild win on Wednesday.

articles.title: Former child actor accuses Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs of sexual assault in new lawsuit - CNN
articles.description: A rep for Combs denied the allegations in the lawsuit, which comes as the mogul is serving more than four years in prison following his conviction on two counts of transportation to engage in prostitution.

articles.title: ‘Summer House’ Is Reality TV’s Midlife Crisis - Vulture
articles.description: ‘Summer House season ten may have been overshadowed by Amanda and West’s infidelity, but more than that, it is tinted by the original cast’s creeping consciousness that they’re not 22 anymore.
